docs_events.rationale: ADR-048/spec/issues already define the intended preview, plot, and save/export behavior; this bugfix wires implementation and tests without changing the documented contract.

owner_directive: Fix PR1577 user-facing ADR-048 blockers: legacy API SPA fallback must not return 200 HTML; block output collections preview collection-first; block-bound plot GUI run entry in the right preview pane; save/export uses system file dialog to save to a user-selected path.

scope_events.reason: Preview resource save requires session-manager support to reuse bounded resource reads and sanitized plot export payloads.
